prompt_text:
### Demographics: 75-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 22 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Insulin Glargine 15units once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 82.4 kg; Height 167.7 cm; BMI 29.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/88 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.6%; 9 months ago 9.9%; 6 months ago 9.9%; 3 months ago 9.6%; current 9.7%), FPG (12 months ago 236mg/dL; 9 months ago 246mg/dL; 6 months ago 238mg/dL; 3 months ago 208mg/dL; current 229mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 84.9kg; 9 months ago 79.6kg; 6 months ago 78.7kg; 3 months ago 74.9kg; current 82.4kg), Height (12 months ago 167.7cm; 9 months ago 167.7cm; 6 months ago 167.7cm; 3 months ago 167.7cm; current 167.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 27.0kg/m²; current 29.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 123mmHg; 9 months ago 125mmHg; 6 months ago 127mmHg; 3 months ago 127mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 88mmHg; 9 months ago 91mmHg; 6 months ago 91mmHg; 3 months ago 89mmHg; current 88mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 42U/L; 9 months ago 40U/L; 6 months ago 37U/L; 3 months ago 26U/L; current 39U/L), AST (12 months ago 48U/L; 9 months ago 44U/L; 6 months ago 41U/L; 3 months ago 44U/L; current 52U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 34mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; current 33mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 144mg/g; 9 months ago 120mg/g; 6 months ago 168mg/g; 3 months ago 146mg/g; current 160mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 83mg/dL; 9 months ago 87mg/dL; 6 months ago 88mg/dL; 3 months ago 88mg/dL; current 85mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 37mg/dL; 9 months ago 36mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 38mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 149mg/dL; 9 months ago 160mg/dL; 6 months ago 144mg/dL; 3 months ago 159mg/dL; current 154mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.8g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.6g/dL; current 11.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
